title: MrSwords & Tools 3D Vanilla Glowing
description: Enhances Minecraft’s weapons and tools with detailed 3D models and luminous effects that glow in the dark. Fully compatible with Vanilla Minecraft—Shaders are not necessary
body:
![donations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ec3d8a5316b0b542a54ce2fe11aeebf8862eed7.png)
[A donation makes my time worthwhile; please consider supporting me if you like this content.](https://paypal.me/MrTuGaaGames)

**MrSwords & Tools 3D Vanilla Glowing**
![MrSwords & Tools 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/894d652f2c8631df539b1d26da1889facf15be0f_0.webp)
Is a high-quality resource pack that upgrades Minecraft’s swords, pickaxes, axes, shovels, and hoes with custom 3D models and glowing effects visible in dark environments. Designed to work fully in Vanilla Minecraft, this pack requires no mods, shaders, or OptiFine, making it ideal for players who want enhanced visuals without compromising performance or compatibility.

This pack is part of a modular series focused on emissive 3D design, and it complements [MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-vanilla-glowing) or [MrOres 3D Glowing (Optifine/Continuity)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-glowing-(optifinecontinuity)) for a complete glowing experience across tools and ores.
![MrSwords & Tools 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69a14f6776a48c98fb970c6c83564e6a86289ca_0.webp)
**🔧 Key Features:**

Detailed 3D models for all major tools and weapons.

Glowing textures that activate in low-light conditions.

Optimized for Vanilla gameplay—no external dependencies.

Lightweight and version-compatible for smooth performance.

🌟 Alternate Version Available: For users who play with OptiFine or Continuity, a separate version is available: MrSwords & Tools 3D Glowing (OptiFine/Continuity) This variant includes enhanced emissive mapping and shader-friendly textures for even more visual depth.

**📸 Recommendations:**

Use in survival, adventure, or creative worlds for immersive gameplay.

Combine with [MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-vanilla-glowing) or [MrOres 3D Glowing (Optifine/Continuity)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-glowing-(optifinecontinuity)) for a unified glowing aesthetic.

For OptiFine users, enable emissive textures in settings for full effect.
![MrSwords & Tools 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5061129a9dca6237343e4832a585dc576ba3536e_0.webp)
**📜 License & Usage:** This resource pack is protected by a custom license. Redistribution, modification, or monetization without explicit permission is strictly prohibited. Full license terms are included in the download.
